---
title: (Math) Blog
date: 2025-05-03
author: Apurva Nakade
categories: 
page-layout: full
listing: 
  contents: "../posts/**/*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [image, date, title, categories]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  image-height: 250px
title-block-banner: true
---

<!-- I'm lucky to have a profession where I get paid for doing something I like and at the same time have a positive impact in the world. When people ask me when I plan to retire I like to say never.  -->

This is a place for me to write about the two parts of my professional identity: [a mathematician](maths/index.qmd) and [an educator](scribbles/index.qmd). 

<!-- I like to think of my writings here as an aspect of my identity as a math educator. Writing is something I like to do for its own sake. Because I think words are powerful and magical. They are my oldest, wisest, and most cherished friends and here I am  -->
